ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AssetRipper/AssetRipper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AssetRipper/AssetRipper
Language: c%23
GUI application to analyze game files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kareadita/Kavita
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kareadita/Kavita
Language: c%23
Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LibreHardwareMonitor/LibreHardwareMonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LibreHardwareMonitor/LibreHardwareMonitor
Language: c%23
Libre Hardware Monitor is free software that can monitor the temperature sensors, fan speeds, voltages, load and clock speeds of your computer.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Linsxyx/KugouMusic.NET
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Linsxyx/KugouMusic.NET
Language: c%23
最好用最轻量的第三方酷狗概念版音乐播放器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MonoGame/MonoGame
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MonoGame/MonoGame
Language: c%23
One framework for creating powerful cross-platform games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Radarr/Radarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Radarr/Radarr
Language: c%23
Movie organizer/manager for usenet and torrent users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SubtitleEdit/subtitleedit

URL: https://github.com/SubtitleEdit/subtitleedit
Language: c%23
the subtitle editor :)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime

URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gibbed/SteamAchievementManager
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
Language: c%23
OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
Language: c%23
Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

URL: https://github.com/ppy/osu
Language: c%23
rhythm is just a *click* away!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight Armoury Crate alternative for Asus laptops with nearly the same functionality. Works with ROG Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, ProArt, Vivobook, Zenbook, Expertbook, ROG Ally, and many more.
